metadata.title: Client Asking for Discount | FlowDockr Guide
metadata.description: How freelancers can respond to discount requests without collapsing margin.

hero.title: A discount request is a negotiation signal.
hero.description: Respond with structured options instead of immediate price cuts.

usage.label: Playbook
usage.title: 3-step objection response
usage.description: Keep control while preserving relationship quality.

items.title: Acknowledge budget
items.description: Confirm constraints without agreeing to reduce immediately.

items.title: Reframe by outcomes
items.description: Link pricing to risk reduction and deliverable impact.

items.title: Offer conditional options
items.description: Trade scope, speed, or terms instead of pure price cuts.

cta.title: Generate a negotiation-ready reply.
cta.description: Use wording that protects value and moves to a decision.
